reasoning: The key limiter for Koren is poor lactate clearance. Considering the extended rest showing a maintenance trend, it’s critical to focus on structured over-under intervals. These intervals directly address Koren's needs and prepare him for the sustained effort required on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 5 sets of 6 minutes: 2 minutes at 242W-256W followed by 3 minutes at 201W-218W, then 1 minute easy. Focus on maintaining form and breathing.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
